summary: Completed frontend testing of Zerofalse AI Agent Runtime Security SaaS application. All 8 pages render correctly with the new design system. Signup/Login flows work, protected routes redirect properly, and all UI interactions function as expected.

integration_issues.flow: API Keys page direct URL access
integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /api-keys URL returns 404 from backend due to ingress routing /api-* to backend. Works correctly when navigating via sidebar.

action_items: Consider renaming /api-keys route to /keys or /apikeys to avoid ingress routing conflict (optional - sidebar navigation works fine)
critical_code_review_comments: APIKeys.jsx line 36: Fixed response.data.keys to handle array response from backend
Missing data-testid attributes on some filter dropdowns (verdict-filter, tool-filter, severity-filter, status-filter) - not blocking but would improve testability
Dashboard stat cards missing data-testid attributes (stat-total-scans, stat-threats-blocked, stat-open-alerts)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 pages tested and working: Landing, Signup, Login, Dashboard, ScanLogs, Alerts, APIKeys, Settings. Protected routes redirect to login correctly. Settings page has 5 tabs (profile, organization, notifications, security, billing) all working. API Keys page works via sidebar navigation. Create API Key modal opens and accepts input.

navigation_tested.protected_routes_redirect: PASS - /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
navigation_tested.sidebar_navigation: PASS - all sidebar links work correctly
